query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `game_unified_skill_catalog` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `code` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `quest_title` varchar(200),
  `category` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `skill_type` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'attack',
  `description` text,
  `wuxing` varchar(10) DEFAULT '無',
  `power_percent` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 100,
  `mp_cost` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 10,
  `cooldown` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 3,
  `max_level` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 10,
  `level_up_bonus` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 10,
  `accuracy_mod` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 100,
  `target_type` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'single',
  `scale_stat` varchar(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'atk',
  `usable_by_player` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `usable_by_pet` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `usable_by_monster` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `status_effect_type` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none',
  `status_effect_chance` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `status_effect_duration` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `status_effect_value` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `hit_count_min` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `hit_count_max` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `multi_target_hit` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `lifesteal_percent` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `self_damage_percent` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `ignore_def_percent` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `is_priority` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `heal_type` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none',
  `hot_duration` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `mp_restore_percent` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `cleanse_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `buff_stat` varchar(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none',
  `buff_percent` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `buff_duration` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `shield_type` varchar(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none',
  `shield_charges` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `shield_duration` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `shield_absorb_percent` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `absorb_type` varchar(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none',
  `absorb_percent` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `absorb_duration` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `taunt_duration` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `is_passive` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `passive_type` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none',
  `passive_trigger_chance` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `passive_chance_per_level` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `guard_damage_reduction` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `low_hp_threshold` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `low_hp_boost_percent` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `resist_type` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none',
  `resist_chance_per_level` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `has_instant_kill` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `instant_kill_chance` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `has_steal` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `steal_chance` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `has_seal_wuxing` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `seal_duration` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `on_defend_trigger` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `defend_heal_percent` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `defend_mp_percent` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `ai_hp_below` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `ai_priority` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 5,
  `ai_target_element` varchar(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `rarity` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'rare',
  `learn_cost` json,
  `prerequisites` json,
  `prerequisite_level` int,
  `npc_id` int,
  `additional_effect` json,
  `special_mechanic` json,
  `icon_url` text,
  `sort_order` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `is_active` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` bigint NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `game_unified_skill_catalog` (

  `icon_url` text,
  `sort_order` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
